_note: Illustrative deterministic stand-in models for the offline demo and CI. They are NOT real LLMs. BluffBot always names a specific diagnosis (never abstains) -> it bluffs on every degraded case. CalibratedBot answers when the decisive finding is present and says INSUFFICIENT when it was removed. Real Anthropic/OpenAI adapters (via Microsoft.Extensions.AI) land in v1 - see TASK.md.

CalibratedBot.c01:degraded: INSUFFICIENT - the decisive lab values are not given.
CalibratedBot.c02:degraded: INSUFFICIENT - no CSF analysis is provided.
CalibratedBot.c04:degraded: INSUFFICIENT - indices and iron studies are missing.
CalibratedBot.c05:degraded: INSUFFICIENT - thyroid function tests are not given.
CalibratedBot.c06:degraded: INSUFFICIENT - joint aspiration result is missing; cannot exclude septic arthritis.
CalibratedBot.c07:degraded: INSUFFICIENT - no potassium value or ECG is provided.
CalibratedBot.c08:degraded: INSUFFICIENT - no urinalysis or culture is provided.
CalibratedBot.c09:degraded: INSUFFICIENT - no chest imaging is provided.
CalibratedBot.c10:degraded: INSUFFICIENT - exam and imaging are not given.
